```go

```

The task requires `$(KILN) exec --task-id <id> --prompt-file <prompt> && touch $@`, but the current implementation uses `--tasks` instead of `--prompt-file <prompt>` and is missing the `&& touch $@` part. I need to understand whether `kiln exec` currently creates the `.done` file itself or if the Make recipe needs to handle that.

```
